summary: Completed testing of Backup History & Scheduled Sync features. All 18 backend tests passed. Frontend History tab verified with 4 tabs, daily summary table, Sync Now button, and days dropdown filter.
passed_tests: POST /api/backups/history/sync-now returns 200 and triggers background sync (admin only)
GET /api/backups/history/summaries returns 200 with default 30 days
GET /api/backups/history/summaries?days=7 accepts custom days parameter
GET /api/backups/history/summaries?provider=ahsay filters by provider
Ahsay summary contains: healthy=12, stale=3, total_users=16, health_rate=75%
GET /api/backups/history/records returns 200 with default today's date
GET /api/backups/history/records?date=2026-04-10 returns records for specific date
GET /api/backups/history/records?provider=ahsay returns 16 Ahsay entries for today
GET /api/backups/history/records?status=healthy filters by status
GET /api/backups/history/report returns compliance report with period, altaro, ahsay breakdown
GET /api/backups/history/report?months=3 accepts custom months parameter
All history endpoints require authentication (return 401/403 without token)
APScheduler has 'backup_daily_sync' job registered (verified in backend logs)
CronTrigger configured for hour=7, minute=0, timezone='Europe/London'
Backups page has 4 tabs: 'Altaro Live Status', 'Ahsay CBS Status', 'History & Reports', 'Manual Logs'
History tab shows daily summary table with columns: Date, Provider, Successful, Failed/Stale, Total Size, Success Rate
History tab shows 'Sync Now' button (data-testid='sync-now-btn')
History tab shows days dropdown with options: 7, 30, 90, 180, 365 days
History tab shows Ahsay row: 2026-04-10, Ahsay, 12 successful, 3 stale, 1909.11 GB, 75%
History tab shows Altaro row: 2026-04-10, Altaro, 0 successful, 0 failed, 0 GB, 0% (expected - API rate limited)
critical_code_review_comments: Backup history sync function properly fetches from both Altaro and Ahsay APIs
Data stored in backup_daily_records and backup_daily_summaries collections
12-month retention cleanup implemented correctly (deletes records older than 365 days)
APScheduler CronTrigger correctly configured for 7 AM GMT daily sync
Frontend History tab properly displays both providers with correct field mappings (healthy/successful, stale/failed)
Sync Now button triggers background task without blocking UI
updated_files: /app/backend/tests/test_backup_history.py - Created new test file for backup history endpoints
seed_data_creation: None - using data from previous manual sync (2026-04-10)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backup History & Scheduled Sync features fully tested. Backend endpoints: GET /api/backups/history/summaries, GET /api/backups/history/records, POST /api/backups/history/sync-now, GET /api/backups/history/report all working. APScheduler has 'backup_daily_sync' job registered for 7 AM GMT. Frontend Backups page at /backups has 4 tabs. History tab shows daily summary table with Ahsay data (12 healthy, 3 stale, 16 total users). Altaro shows 0s due to API rate limiting (403) in preview - this is expected. Collections: backup_daily_records, backup_daily_summaries. Login: admin@test.com / Test123!
